---
title: "Random forests"
subtitle: "Diving deeper"
author: "Jeremiah Shrovnal, Grant Vagle, Lynn Waterhouse"
institute: 
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---

# Overview of this section

- Random forest models

  - Algorithm overview, with hyper parameters
  
  - Intro to model tuning
  
- Example model with correlated predictors

  - A look at predictive performance
  
  - A look at model interpretation
  
    - Variable importance - intention and calculation
    
    - Partial dependence - how it's calculated and how to interpret
    
- Introduce the coding examples

- Hands-on coding example


---
